allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Content skynamo_geolocation.py -Raw\) -replace '"error"', '"notes"' -replace 'error=error', 'notes=error' -replace 'error=approx_note', 'notes=approx_note' -replace 'error="Address could not be geocoded"', 'notes="Address could not be geocoded"' -replace '\(?m\)^\(\\s+\)"status": status, "address_used": address,$', '$1"status": status, "address_used": address,' | Set-Content skynamo_geolocation.py -Encoding utf8; python -m py_compile skynamo_geolocation.py; if \($?\) { Write-Output "OK" })
